flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Georgia Military College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.8k → $8.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Georgia Military College rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.8k → $8.1k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Georgia Military College fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (4.5k → 4.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Georgia Military College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).
